framework.name: No novel crypto needed for agent auth
framework.description: Draft's core thesis: agent auth does NOT require new protocols or crypto primitives. Existing OAuth 2.0, SPIFFE, WIMSE, mTLS, HTTP Message Signatures compose into a complete solution. This directly counters startups claiming novel agent identity protocols are needed.
framework.raw_quote: Rather than defining new protocols, this document describes how existing and widely deployed standards can be applied or extended to establish agent authentication and authorization.

source.title: draft-klrc-aiagent-auth-00 - AI Agent Authentication and Authorization
